Now I will teach you color.<[silence:60ms]>

Look at fire—its light is not all same.<[silence:60ms]> Some burns bright like sun (this is yellow), some glows deep like fresh blood (this is red).<[silence:60ms]> Sky when sun sleeps is dark like wet stone (this is blue).<[silence:60ms]> Green is life:<[silence:80ms]> new leaves, soft moss, what grows.<[silence:60ms]> Touch things, see how light plays—color is light’s different bites on your eyes.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you color.

Look at fire—its light is not all same. Some burns bright like sun (this is yellow), some glows deep like fresh blood (this is red). Sky when sun sleeps is dark like wet stone (this is blue). Green is life: new leaves, soft moss, what grows. Touch things, see how light plays—color is light’s different bites on your eyes.
